title: Create PCs
description: Create more blocks is a mod that aims to add some more computer-type blocks to the create mod E.G: monitors and 2000s pcs.
body:
# Disclamer this mod is no longer in development and no more updates will be released

### Because this mod is discontunes all of the assetse are now on [Github](https://github.com/Westmoon07/create-pc-archive)

Required mods:

Create

Currently implemented features:

Macintosh 128K - blocks used for decorating (Uses are limited will have more uses soon)

IBM 5155 - blocks used for decorating (Uses are limited will have more uses soon)

secret music disk: Lost - Pizza Parlor

secret music disk 2: Lost - Никогда не откажусь от тебя

hidden blocks (try and find them)

floppy disks in all colers and towers

Join the discord:[https://discord.gg/tyXhPYsAfx](https://discord.gg/tyXhPYsAfx)

follow me on Twitter (X) to see development updates and give feedback
twitter.com/westmoon07

(Also yes I know the textures are bad and will change (if you are a texture artist and want to help out contact me on Twitter twitter.com/westmoon07 or discord @westmoon05)
